---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
labels: enhancement
---

## Summary

A short description of the feature you'd like to see.

## Problem it solves

What problem does this feature address? Who benefits?

## Proposed solution

How you think it could work. Include mockups or examples if helpful.

## Alternatives considered

Any other approaches you thought about and why you ruled them out.

## Additional context

Links, references, or anything else relevant.
